title: 2d items in GUI inventory
description: Makes all items 2d in GUI for better visibility, idea from DearFox
body:
# 2d items

- idea from [GUI 2D Blocks in inventory](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-2d)
- rewrote for 1.21.11
- only changes json files, so compatible with most resource packs

# mini versions

- the mini versions (labeled v*m) also shrinks the view models
- idea from [Mini Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mini-items-pack)
- 2d items and mini items conflict with each other, which is why I made this

# why use this

- inventory and chests look much cleaner
- light grey or grey concrete turns invisible
